channel.title: Recycling on Factorio Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Recycling on Factorio Guide

item.title: Fulgora Scrap Overflow -- How to Void Excess Items and Keep Production Running
item.description:
Fulgora is the only planet where your factory generates items faster than you can use them. Each

Recycler
produces 8 different output types from a single scrap input. When one item backs up (stone, concrete, ice), it clogs the belt and stalls your entire
Holmium ore
supply. The fix is a priority-based sorting system with controlled overflow destruction -- not bigger buffers.

TL;DR: Every Fulgora base needs a circuit-controlled

Splitter

that routes overflow items into recyclers for destruction. Priority order: holmium ore > processing units > iron gear wheels > copper plates > everything else. Items that can't be consumed within 2 belts of sorting get voided. Adding recyclers for overflow management actually increases your holmium output.

The Mechanics Behind the Overflow

Each scrap recycled outputs 8 item types with very different quantities:
